name: GENERAL DYNAMICS CORP
summary: General Dynamics is a global aerospace and defense company organized into four segments: Aerospace, Marine Systems, Combat Systems, and Technologies. It produces Gulfstream business jets and aircraft services via Jet Aviation; designs and builds nuclear-powered submarines and surface combatants; manufactures land combat vehicles, weapon systems, and munitions; and provides IT and technology services. Revenue in 2025 was led by defense segments alongside a growing aerospace business.
